description: Fingerprint data. Availability of this node depends on the configuration of your account, please contact our Support Team for more details.
title: Web

attempt_reference.description: Identifier of a payment attempt (should not be used in a data mining)

ip.description: The IP address from which a connection with the Profiler was established

proxied_for_ip.description: The IP address on behalf of which the proxy connected to the profiler

first_persistent_cookie.description: User identification saved in browser (null in case of mobile SDK)

items.description: List of leaked IP addresses (null in case of mobile SDK)

detected_hops.description: All leaked ip addresses (null in case of mobile SDK)

addr.description: Use `ip` field in root fingerprint object response. IP address declared by the user

items.description: Local ip address (null in case of mobile SDK)

local_ip_addresses.description: All leaked ip addresses (null in case of mobile SDK)

cookie_first_seen.description: Timestamp of creation of first persistent cookie (null in case of mobile SDK)
